posts.author: 2Scoops2Terms2Walls

In 1991 Canada's foreign-born population was 16% and 60% of those immigrants were Westerners. Remittances were just $1.13 billion.

Remittances from Canada now exceed $13 billion.

Remittances from Canada now exceed $13 billion.
